We Partner With Brave Outliers

Who Challenge
the Status Quo

We
believee

Innodapter ApS is a crypto-native fund that partners with brave outliers challenging the status quo by redefining ownership.

That ownership will be redefined by open, inclusive and permissionless crypto networks

Guidance and hands-on help from A to Z

We support our founders.

Active participants

Writing checks is easy. We roll up our sleeves and jump head-on into the trenches with you. We work alongside our founders in true partnership. Active participation matters to us.

Bold and early

Creating the future isn't for the faint of heart. It takes guts and courage. We value bold founders who act on their insights. And we strive to partner-up with founders from the beginning.

Technical Fluency

Technical details matter. Whether its design or functionality, we want to know how it works. The most technical founders intrigue us, and we believe they are the ones with the power to change the status quo.

Relationships matter

Navigating market complexities can be tough on your own. Legendary projects require strong relationships -- rich with meaning, transparency and support. We think long-term when it comes to relationships. They matter.

Companies we keep

Meet our bold outliers
